audit_result.proof_trace: Cache prunes data columns after only 2 slots (DATA_COLUMN_RETAIN_DURATION_IN_SLOTS=2) instead of the required 131,072 slots (MIN_EPOCHS_FOR_DATA_COLUMN_SIDECARS_REQUESTS=4096 epochs). This 65,536x discrepancy causes premature eviction of data that must be served to peers.
audit_result.attack_scenario: Peer requests data columns for slot current_slot-100 (valid per MIN_EPOCHS). P2P handler validates request as legitimate, but cache has already pruned entries older than 2 slots. Node fails to serve valid historical data, violating protocol availability requirements.

PROP-57888860-inv-032.text: Sidecars must be retained for at least MIN_EPOCHS_FOR_DATA_COLUMN_SIDECARS_REQUESTS epochs.
PROP-57888860-inv-032.assertion: forall sidecar: current_epoch - sidecar_epoch <= MIN_EPOCHS_FOR_DATA_COLUMN_SIDECARS_REQUESTS => sidecar is stored AND served on request
